item.title: Wispr Flow launches an Android app for AI-powered dictation
item.description: AI-powered dictation startup Wispr Flow has launched its Android app today. The company released its app for Mac and Windows first, then launched on i...

item.title: NASA Delays Launch of Artemis II Lunar Mission Once Again
item.description: A failure in the helium flow of the SLS rocket has prompted NASA to delay the Artemis II moon mission. Rather than March 6, the launch is now targeted...

item.title: Apple might take a new approach to announcing its next products
item.description: Apple has invited the tech press to a “special Apple experience” on March 4, but it might unfold a bit differently than the company's standard press e...

item.title: Can the creator economy stay afloat in a flood of AI slop?
item.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we debated what’s next for the creator economy, and whether there will be any room for the next generation of creator...

item.title: Bill Gurley says that right now, the worst thing you can do for your career is play it safe
item.description: "The number one thing is to get out of your head this ideal that gets passed around in the self-help world: 'go get a mentor,' and everyone runs out a...
